headline: Raymond James Baycrest Partnership Links Brain Health To Wealth Strategy
summary: Raymond James Ltd. and Baycrest Foundation have formed a new partnership focused on the financial planning challenges tied to brain health and caregiving in Canadian families. The collaboration combines financial planning expertise with brain health research to support families dealing with cognitive decline and aging related issues. For investors watching Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF), this partnership adds a social impact angle to a stock that is currently trading at $154.33. Over...

headline: Raymond James deepens Baycrest Foundation relationship to help Canadians protect brain health, wealth and family legacy
summary: Raymond James Ltd. today announced an expanded relationship with Baycrest Foundation as a 2026 Impact Partner, reinforcing a shared commitment to help Canadian families better understand the connection between brain health, caregiving, and financial planning.

headline: American Electric Power Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
summary: American Electric Power has underperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
